guidance: 1. The agent may call get_vehicles_by_type with vehicle_type set to "caminhoes" to list available truck brands for fleet procurement analysis.
common_constraints: request is for fleet procurement analysis

guidance: 2. The agent may call get_vehicles_by_type with vehicle_type set to "trucks" to list available truck brands for fleet procurement analysis.
common_constraints: request is for fleet procurement analysis

guidance: 3. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Scania" for truck-relevant brand price research.
common_constraints: request is for truck-relevant brand price research

guidance: 4. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Volvo" for truck-relevant brand price research.
common_constraints: request is for truck-relevant brand price research

guidance: 5. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Mercedes-Benz" for truck-relevant brand price research.
common_constraints: request is for truck-relevant brand price research

guidance: 6. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "MAN" for truck-relevant brand price research.
common_constraints: request is for truck-relevant brand price research

guidance: 7. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "DAF" for truck-relevant brand price research.
common_constraints: request is for truck-relevant brand price research

guidance: 8. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Iveco" for truck-relevant brand price research.
common_constraints: request is for truck-relevant brand price research

guidance: 9. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Ford" for Ford Cargo line truck price research.
common_constraints: request is for Ford Cargo line truck price research

guidance: 10. The agent may call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Volkswagen" for VW Constellation/Delivery lines truck price research.
common_constraints: request is for VW Constellation/Delivery lines truck price research

guidance: 11. The agent may call get_car_brands to verify brand availability when the analyst is unsure of the exact brand name in the FIPE database.
common_constraints: analyst is unsure of exact brand name in FIPE database
allow_conditions: verification of brand availability is needed

guidance: 12. The agent may present FIPE reference prices clearly labeled as reference values, not binding purchase prices.
common_constraints: FIPE prices are being presented
allow_conditions: prices are clearly labeled as reference values
prices are clearly labeled as not binding purchase prices

guidance: 13. The agent may retrieve pricing for multiple truck brands in sequence when the analyst requests a comparison.
common_constraints: analyst requests a comparison
allow_conditions: retrieving pricing for multiple truck brands in sequence

guidance: 14. The agent must not call get_vehicles_by_type with vehicle_type set to "carros".
15. The agent must not call get_vehicles_by_type with vehicle_type set to "cars".
16. The agent must not call get_vehicles_by_type with vehicle_type set to "motos".
17. The agent must not call get_vehicles_by_type with vehicle_type set to "motorcycles".
18. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Toyota" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
19. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Honda" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
20. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Hyundai" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
21. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Fiat" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
22. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Chevrolet" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
23. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Jeep" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
24. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "BMW" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
25. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Audi" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
26. The agent must not call search_car_price with brand_name set to "Nissan" as it is a passenger-car-only brand.
27. The agent must not loop through all brands in the truck category to build a bulk pricing database.
disallow_conditions: looping through all brands in truck category

guidance: 28. The agent may only look up brands the analyst specifically names.
disallow_conditions: looking up brands not specifically named by analyst

guidance: 29. The agent must not present FIPE values as legally binding appraisals.
common_constraints: FIPE values are being presented
disallow_conditions: presenting FIPE values as legally binding appraisals

guidance: 30. The agent must not present FIPE values as guaranteed resale values.
common_constraints: FIPE values are being presented
disallow_conditions: presenting FIPE values as guaranteed resale values

guidance: 31. The agent must not calculate total cost of ownership for vehicles.
disallow_conditions: calculating total cost of ownership for vehicles

guidance: 32. The agent must not calculate financing terms for vehicles.
33. The agent must not recommend specific purchase decisions.
34. The agent must not query more than 5 distinct brands in a single conversation turn without explicit analyst instruction.
common_constraints: single conversation turn
allow_conditions: explicit analyst instruction to query more than 5 brands
disallow_conditions: querying more than 5 distinct brands without explicit analyst instruction

guidance: 35. When the analyst asks about a brand that manufactures both trucks and passenger cars, the agent should proceed with the lookup but clarify that search_car_price results show models from the FIPE car database.
common_constraints: brand manufactures both trucks and passenger cars
allow_conditions: proceeding with lookup and clarifying results show models from FIPE car database

guidance: 36. When the analyst asks about a brand that manufactures both trucks and passenger cars, the agent should clarify that truck-specific models may require browsing the truck category via get_vehicles_by_type("caminhoes").
common_constraints: brand manufactures both trucks and passenger cars
allow_conditions: clarifying that truck-specific models may require browsing truck category

guidance: 37. When the analyst asks to "check all truck prices," the agent should ask which specific brands to compare rather than enumerating the full list.
common_constraints: analyst asks to check all truck prices
allow_conditions: asking which specific brands to compare
disallow_conditions: enumerating the full list of truck brands

guidance: 38. When the analyst requests motorcycle data, the agent should decline and explain that its scope is limited to commercial vehicle truck procurement research.
common_constraints: analyst requests motorcycle data

guidance: 39. When the analyst requests passenger car data, the agent should decline and explain that its scope is limited to commercial vehicle truck procurement research.
common_constraints: analyst requests passenger car data
